passive_eikthyr_effect_start: The grace of the mighty stag flows through you
passive_eikthyr_effect_tooltip: The grace of the mighty stag flows through you. Your ability to move around is slightly improved, be it on land or in water.
passive_elder_effect_start: The power of the forest invigorates you
passive_elder_effect_tooltip: The power of the forest invigorates you. You shall gather its bounties slightly faster, just as you shall regain your own vitality should you lose it.
passive_bonemass_effect_start: The mass takes the brunt of your blows
passive_bonemass_effect_tooltip: The mass takes the brunt of your blows. The effort required to raise your shield slightly lessens, and you can slightly withstand harder hits. (Damage reduction does not show but is applied)
passive_moder_effect_start: The dragon's wings urge you on
passive_moder_effect_tooltip: The dragon's wings urge you on. You shall always have tailwind while sailing, and you shall swiftly carry some heavy burdens, even over the coldest mountains. (Damage reduction does not show but is applied)
passive_moder_sail_tooltip: The dragon's wings urge you on. You shall always have tailwind while sailing.
passive_yagluth_effect_start: The ancient stones speak to you
passive_yagluth_effect_tooltip: The fallen king lends you some of his might. A king must have the power to vanquish his foes, just as he must be able to support his people. (Damage reduction does not show but is applied)
passive_queen_effect_start: The seeker's mind bends to your will
passive_queen_effect_tooltip: Her Majesty somewhat blesses you. In her shadow both stealth and magic may somewhat flourish, and poison shall somewhat harm you. (Damage reduction does not show but is applied)
passive_fader_effect_start: The ash storms answer to your call
passive_fader_effect_tooltip: The Emerald Flame never relents. You shall stand your ground, even when it is aflame, and you shall use all the advantages the battle may offer you. (Damage reduction does not show but is applied)
